extract: Lilligant (Japanese: ドレディア Dredear) is a Grass-type Pokémon introduced in Generation V. It evolves from Petilil when exposed to a Sun Stone. In Hisui, Lilligant has a dual-type Grass/Fighting regional form. It evolves from Petilil when exposed to a Sun Stone. All Petilil in Hisui will evolve into this form regardless of their origin.
